headline: DoorDash White House Spotlight On No Tax Tips And Valuation Gap
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) is featured at a high profile White House event spotlighting a "no tax on tips" policy affecting its drivers. The event highlights how untaxed tips influence gig worker earnings and the broader economics of independent gig work on the platform. DoorDash is presented as an active voice in debates over gig economy regulation and worker classification. The company’s role in this national policy conversation is drawing fresh attention from investors and other...
